note: WDLL 51. Base-zone scalar rows transcribed from City of Austin LDC ?25-2-492 public table at https://services.austintexas.gov/edims/document.cfm?id=419477, cross-referenced by the City zoning resources page https://www.austintexas.gov/planning/zoning-resources-site-regulations (accessed 2026-07-23). These rows serve only the listed base GIS stamps. OMITTED: Austin combining and overlay districts (CO, NCCD, PUD, downtown, etc.), compatibility/average-front-yard calculations, watershed controls, and any use-, lot-, or frontage-dependent variation because the envelope request lacks those facts.
